items.text: numberServicesTrue is the count of true values among inpGCASM, inpSAM, inpACASM, inpGFM, inpWxM, and inpFLS
items.fragment: numberServicesTrue is the count of true values among inpGCASM, inpSAM, inpACASM, inpGFM, inpWxM, and inpFLS
items.requirement_fragment: numberServicesTrue is the count of true values among inpGCASM, inpSAM, inpACASM, inpGFM, inpWxM, and inpFLS

items.text: dynamicDecide logic: if inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery >= 0, decision is ACAS; else, decision is GCAS
items.fragment: dynamicDecide logic: if inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery >= 0, decision is ACAS; else, decision is GCAS
items.requirement_fragment: dynamicDecide logic: if inpGCASImpact > inpACASImpact and inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery >= 0, decision is ACAS; else, decision is GCAS

items.text: outDec is dynamic decision result when numberServicesTrue >= 2; else, outDec is static priority-based value
